# A file cannot be its own sink. Without the identity guard, move mode
# renders the source without the selected declarations and rename-overwrites
# the just-written sink, so a blank-identifier declaration (no collision key
# to save it accidentally) silently vanishes while the run exits 0.
# Expect: non-zero exit in both modes, error naming the file, source unchanged.
cp a.go a_before.go
! exec sflit -source a.go -sink a.go -regex '^_$' -move
stderr 'source a.go and sink a.go are the same file'
cmp a.go a_before.go

! exec sflit -source a.go -sink a.go -regex '^_$'
stderr 'source a.go and sink a.go are the same file'
cmp a.go a_before.go

-- a.go --
package p

import "io"

var _ io.Reader = (*B)(nil)

type B struct{}
